chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.610 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs 1. For hearing of main case 2. For hearing of M.A. No.9972/2023 ------------------------------------- 16.05.2025 Ms. Amna Ansari, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh ------------------------------------ None present for the applicant. Same was the position on last two dates of hearings viz. 15.11.2024 and 17.03.2025. Continuous absence of applicant and his counsel shows that they have lost interest to pursue their case. Therefore, instant criminal miscellaneous application is dismissed on account of non-prosecution along with pending application(s). J U D G E Gulsher/PS
